data.title: US Car Buyers Throng Dealerships As Trump's Tariff Threat Looms Over Prices
data.description: In the lead-up to 'Liberation Day' car dealerships in the US are seeing a spike in footfalls, as consumers race to book their new vehicles.

data.title: Mark Cuban Dismisses Concerns of AI Causing Deflation, Calls It The "Greatest Growth And Productivity Engine Ever"
data.description: Mark Cuban is arguing against the notion that AI will cause deflation and believes that it will be a driver of innovation and productivity.

data.title: Ethereum Could Drop To $1,500 Before Pectra Upgrade, But $8,000 Remains In Sight
data.description: Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) could drop to $1,500 before the repeatedly delayed Pectra upgrade launches in late April, according to MEXC Chief Operating Officer Tracy Jin, though long-term projections remain optimistic with

data.title: Trump Travel Ban Might Hit This Bitcoin-Friendly Country And No It's Not El Salvador
data.description: The Donald Trump administration is considering putting stringent travel restrictions on several countries, with citizens from up to 11 countries facing a total ban on entering the U.S.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Hates It When Trump Pumps His Own Coin, But Loves The President's Bitcoin Moves — This Complex Crypto Relationship Decoded
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, an influential cryptocurrency advocate and founder of investment firm SkyBridge Capital, has alternated between supporting President Donald Trump's pro-cryptocurrency pivot and warning of the potential pitfalls of some of his decisions.
